summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. The keyword matcher cache has a comprehensive stop mechanism using both context cancellation (ctx.Done()) and a stop channel (stopChan). The Stop() method properly signals the cleanup goroutine to terminate, preventing goroutine leaks during tests.
